v.CNV: 利未支派米拉利的子孙中，有哈沙比雅的曾孙、押利甘的孙子、哈述的儿子示玛雅；

v.CNV: 又有耶杜顿的曾孙、迦拉的孙子、示玛雅的儿子俄巴底；还有以利加拿的孙子、亚撒的儿子比利家；他们都住在尼陀法人的村落。
v.ESV: and Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, son of Galal, son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, son of Elkanah, who lived in the villages of the Netophathites.

v.KJV: And the porters were, Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brethren: Shallum was the chief;
v.KRV: 문지기는 살룸과 악굽과 달몬과 아히만과 그 형제들이니 살룸은 그 두목이라
v.NASB: Now the gatekeepers were Shallum and Akkub and Talmon and Ahiman and their relatives (Shallum the chief

v.ESV: Shallum the son of Kore, son of Ebiasaph, son of Korah, and his kinsmen of his fathers' house, the Korahites, were in charge of the work of the service, keepers of the thresholds of the tent, as their fathers had been in charge of the camp of the Lord , keepers of the entrance.

v.KJV: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of the house of his father, the Korahites, were over the work of the service, keepers of the gates of the tabernacle: and their fathers, being over the host of the LORD, were keepers of the entry.

v.NRSV: Shallum son of Kore, son of Ebiasaph, son of Korah, and his kindred of his ancestral house, the Korahites, were in charge of the work of the service, guardians of the thresholds of the tent, as their ancestors had been in charge of the camp of the LORD, guardians of the entrance.
v.SAENEW: 고라의 증손이요 에비아삽의 손자요 고레의 아들인 살룸과, 그의 가문에 속한 그의 친족들, 즉 고라 족속은, 성막 문을 지키는 임무를 맡았다. 그들의 조상도 주님의 성막 문을 지키는 사람이었다.
v.WLB: 고라의 증손자이며 에비아삽의 손자이며 고레의 아들인 살룸과 그 집안 출신인 형제, 곧 고라 자손들은 성막의 문을 지키는 일을 했습니다. 그 조상들도 여호와께서 계시는 집을 맡고 들어가는 곳을 지켰습니다.

v.NASB: All these who were chosen to be gatekeepers at the thresholds were 212. These were enrolled by genealogy in their villages, whom David and Samuel the seer appointed in their office of trust.

v.WLB: 문지기로 뽑힌 사람의 수는 모두 212명이었습니다. 그들은 자기 마을에서 족보에 올랐습니다. 그 문지기들은 다윗과 선견자 사무엘이 그들을 믿었기에 그 자리를 맡게 됐습니다.

v.KJV: So they and their children had the oversight of the gates of the house of the Lord, namely, the house of the tabernacle, by wards.
v.KRV: 저희와 그 자손이 그 반열을 좇아 여호와의 전 곧 성막문을 지켰는데
v.NASB: So they and their sons had charge of the gates of the house of the LORD, even the house of the tent, as guards.

v.NRSV: So they and their descendants were in charge of the gates of the house of the LORD, that is, the house of the tent, as guards.
v.SAENEW: 그들과 그 자손이 주님의 성전 문 곧 성막 문을 지키는 일을 맡았는데,
v.WLB: 그 문지기들과 그 자손은 대대로 여호와의 집, 곧 성막이라 불리는 집의 문들을 지키는 일을 맡았습니다.

v.CNV: 在东西南北，都有看守的人。
v.ESV: The gatekeepers were on the four sides, east, west, north, and south.
v.GAE: 이 문지기가 동, 서, 남, 북 사방에 섰고
v.KJV: In four quarters were the porters, toward the east, west, north, and south.
v.KRV: 이 문지기가 동 서, 남, 북 사방에 섰고
v.NASB: The gatekeepers were on the four sides, to the east, west, north and south.
v.NIV: The gatekeepers were on the four sides: east, west, north and south.
v.NRSV: The gatekeepers were on the four sides, east, west, north, and south;

v.WLB: 문지기들은 동서남북 사방에 서서 지켰습니다.

v.CNV: 他们的亲族，就是住在他们村庄里的，每七天就要来和他们换班。
v.ESV: And their kinsmen who were in their villages were obligated to come in every seven days, in turn, to be with these,
v.GAE: 그들의 마을에 있는 형제들은 이레마다 와서 그들과 함께 있으니
v.KJV: And their brethren, which were in their villages, were to come after seven days from time to time with them.
v.KRV: 그 향리에 있는 형제들은 이레마다 와서 함께하니
v.NASB: Their relatives in their villages were to come in every seven days from time to time to be with them;
v.NIV: Their fellow Levites in their villages had to come from time to time and share their duties for seven-day periods.
v.NRSV: and their kindred who were in their villages were obliged to come in every seven days, in turn, to be with them;
v.SAENEW: 마을에 사는 그들의 친족들은, 번갈아 와서, 이레씩 그들을 도왔다.
v.WLB: 자기 마을에 있는 그 형제들은 번갈아 가며 7일 동안 그 일을 했습니다.

v.CNV: 四个殿门的守卫长都是利未人，受托看守　神的殿的房间和库房。
v.ESV: for the four chief gatekeepers, who were Levites, were entrusted to be over the chambers and the treasures of the house of God.
v.GAE: 이는 문지기의 우두머리 된 레위 사람 넷이 중요한 직분을 맡아 하나님의 성전 모든 방과 곳간을 지켰음이라
v.KJV: For these Levites, the four chief porters, were in their set office, and were over the chambers and treasuries of the house of God.
v.KRV: 이는 문지기의 두목 된 레위 사람 넷이 긴요한 직분을 맡아 하나님의 전 모든 방과 곳간을 지켰음이라
v.NASB: for the four chief gatekeepers who were Levites, were in an office of trust, and were over the chambers and over the treasuries in the house of God.
v.NIV: But the four principal gatekeepers, who were Levites, were entrusted with the responsibility for the rooms and treasuries in the house of God.
v.NRSV: for the four chief gatekeepers, who were Levites, were in charge of the chambers and the treasures of the house of God.
v.SAENEW: 레위 사람인 네 명의 책임자들은 신실하여서, 하나님 성전의 방과 창고들을 맡았다.
v.WLB: 네 명의 우두머리 문지기들은 레위 사람이었는데 하나님의 집의 안쪽 방들과 보물을 지키는 일을 맡았습니다.

v.CNV: 他们在　神的殿的四周住宿，因为他们承担看守的责任，并且每天早晨要负责开门。
v.ESV: And they lodged around the house of God, for on them lay the duty of watching, and they had charge of opening it every morning.
v.GAE: 그들은 하나님의 성전을 맡은 직분이 있으므로 성전 주위에서 밤을 지내며 아침마다 문을 여는 책임이 그들에게 있었더라
v.KJV: And they lodged round about the house of God, because the charge was upon them, and the opening thereof every morning pertained to them.
v.KRV: 저희는 하나님의 전을 맡은 직분이 있으므로 전 사면에 유하며 아침마다 문을 여는 책임이 있었더라
v.NASB: They spent the night around the house of God, because the watch was committed to them; and they were in charge of opening it morning by morning.
v.NIV: They would spend the night stationed around the house of God, because they had to guard it; and they had charge of the key for opening it each morning.
v.NRSV: And they would spend the night near the house of God; for on them lay the duty of watching, and they had charge of opening it every morning.
v.SAENEW: 그들은 성전을 지키며 아침마다 문을 여는 일을 맡았으므로, 하나님의 성전 주위에 머무르면서 밤을 지냈다.
v.WLB: 그들은 하나님의 집 주변에서 밤을 새며 그곳을 지켰습니다. 또한 그들은 아침마다 성전 문을 여는 책임이 있었습니다.

v.CNV: 利未人中有管理器皿的使用的；他们按着数目拿出去，也要按着数目拿进来。
v.ESV: Some of them had charge of the utensils of service, for they were required to count them when they were brought in and taken out.
v.GAE: 그 중에 어떤 자는 섬기는 데 쓰는 기구를 맡아서 그 수효대로 들여가고 수효대로 내오며
v.KJV: And certain of them had the charge of the ministering vessels, that they should bring them in and out by tale.
v.KRV: 그 중에 어떤 자는 섬기는데 쓰는 기명을 맡아서 그 수효대로 들여가고 수효대로 내어오며
v.NASB: Now some of them had charge of the utensils of service, for they counted them when they brought them in and when they took them out.
v.NIV: Some of them were in charge of the articles used in the temple service; they counted them when they were brought in and when they were taken out.
v.NRSV: Some of them had charge of the utensils of service, for they were required to count them when they were brought in and taken out.
v.SAENEW: 그들 가운데 몇 사람은 성전에서 사용하는 기구를 맡았으므로, 그것들을 세어서 들여오고, 세어서 내주었다.
v.WLB: 그들 가운데 몇몇은 제사에 쓰이는 기구와 그릇들을 맡았습니다. 그 물건들을 들여가고 내갈 때마다 그 수를 세었습니다.

v.CNV: 他们当中又有人受托管理器具，和管理圣所的一切器具，以及细面、酒、油、乳香、香料。
v.ESV: Others of them were appointed over the furniture and over all the holy utensils, also over the fine flour, the wine, the oil, the incense, and the spices.
v.GAE: 또 어떤 자는 성소의 기구와 모든 그릇과 고운 가루와 포도주와 기름과 유향과 향품을 맡았으며
v.KJV: Some of them also were appointed to oversee the vessels, and all the instruments of the sanctuary, and the fine flour, and the wine, and the oil, and the frankincense, and the spices.
v.KRV: 또 어떤 자는 성소의 기구와 모든 기명과 고운 가루와 포도주와 기름과 유향과 향품을 맡았으며
v.NASB: Some of them also were appointed over the furniture and over all the utensils of the sanctuary and over the fine flour and the wine and the oil and the frankincense and the spices.
v.NIV: Others were assigned to take care of the furnishings and all the other articles of the sanctuary, as well as the special flour and wine, and the olive oil, incense and spices.
v.NRSV: Others of them were appointed over the furniture, and over all the holy utensils, also over the choice flour, the wine, the oil, the incense, and the spices.
v.SAENEW: 또 그들 가운데 몇 사람은 성전의 모든 기구와 그 밖의 기구들, 그리고 고운 밀가루와, 포도주와 기름과 유향과 향품을 맡았다.
v.WLB: 다른 사람은 성전의 기구들과 제단의 모든 다른 물건들, 고운 밀가루, 포도주, 기름, 향, 향품들을 맡았습니다.

v.CNV: 祭司的子孙中，有人用香料配制成香膏。
v.ESV: Others, of the sons of the priests, prepared the mixing of the spices,
v.GAE: 또 제사장의 아들 중의 어떤 자는 향품으로 향기름을 만들었으며
v.KJV: And some of the sons of the priests made the ointment of the spices.
v.KRV: 또 제사장의 아들 중에 어떤 자는 향품으로 향기름을 만들었으며
v.NASB: Some of the sons of the priests prepared the mixing of the spices.
v.NIV: But some of the priests took care of mixing the spices.
v.NRSV: Others, of the sons of the priests, prepared the mixing of the spices,
v.SAENEW: 제사장 자손 가운데서 몇 사람은 향료를 배합하여 향수를 만들었다.
v.WLB: 그러나 몇몇 제사장들의 아들들은 향품을 섞어 향 기름을 만드는 일을 했습니다.

v.CNV: 利未人玛他提雅是可拉族沙龙的长子，他的职责是管理在煎盘烤饼的事。
v.ESV: and Mattithiah, one of the Levites, the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, was entrusted with making the flat cakes.
v.GAE: 고라 자손 살룸의 맏아들 맛디댜라 하는 레위 사람은 전병을 굽는 일을 맡았으며
v.KJV: And Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the set office over the things that were made in the pans.
v.KRV: 고라 자손 살룸의 장자 맛디댜라 하는 레위 사람은 남비에 지지는 것을 맡았으며
v.NASB: Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the responsibility over the things which were baked in pans.
v.NIV: A Levite named Mattithiah, the firstborn son of Shallum the Korahite, was entrusted with the responsibility for baking the offering bread.
v.NRSV: and Mattithiah, one of the Levites, the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, was in charge of making the flat cakes.
v.SAENEW: 레위 사람 맛디댜는 고라 자손 살룸의 맏아들로서, 구워서 바치는 제물을 준비하는 일을 맡았다.
v.WLB: 고라의 자손이며 살룸의 맏아들인 맛디댜라는 레위 사람은 빵 굽는 일을 책임 맡게 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 他们的亲族哥辖的子孙中，有管理陈设饼的，每安息日要预备摆设。
v.ESV: Also some of their kinsmen of the Kohathites had charge of the showbread, to prepare it every Sabbath.
v.GAE: 또 그의 형제 그핫 자손 중에 어떤 자는 진설하는 떡을 맡아 안식일마다 준비하였더라
v.KJV: And other of their brethren, of the sons of the Kohathites, were over the shewbread, to prepare it every sabbath.
v.KRV: 또 그 형제 그핫 자손 중에 어떤 자는 진설하는 떡을 맡아 안식일마다 준비하였더라
v.NASB: Some of their relatives of the sons of the Kohathites were over the showbread to prepare it every sabbath.
v.NIV: Some of the Kohathites, their fellow Levites, were in charge of preparing for every Sabbath the bread set out on the table.
v.NRSV: Also some of their kindred of the Kohathites had charge of the rows of bread, to prepare them for each sabbath.
v.SAENEW: 고핫 자손 가운데서 그들의 친족 몇 사람은 안식일마다 차리는 빵을 준비하는 일을 맡았다.
v.WLB: 그들의 형제 그핫 자손 가운데 몇몇은 안식일마다 내갈 빵을 준비하는 일을 맡았습니다.

v.CNV: 这些是歌唱的人，是利未各家族的首领，住在殿院的房间里，不作别的事，日夜只顾自己的事工。
v.ESV: Now these, the singers, the heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, were in the chambers of the temple free from other service, for they were on duty day and night.
v.GAE: 또 찬송하는 자가 있으니 곧 레위 우두머리라 그들은 골방에 거주하면서 주야로 자기 직분에 전념하므로 다른 일은 하지 아니하였더라
v.KJV: And these are the singers, chief of the fathers of the Levites, who remaining in the chambers were free: for they were employed in that work day and night.
v.KRV: 또 찬송하는 자가 있으니 곧 레위 족장이라 저희가 골방에 거하여 주야로 자기 직분에 골몰하므로 다른 일은 하지 아니하였더라
v.NASB: Now these are the singers, heads of fathers' households of the Levites, who lived in the chambers of the temple free from other service; for they were engaged in their work day and night.
v.NIV: Those who were musicians, heads of Levite families, stayed in the rooms of the temple and were exempt from other duties because they were responsible for the work day and night.
v.NRSV: Now these are the singers, the heads of ancestral houses of the Levites, living in the chambers of the temple free from other service, for they were on duty day and night.
v.SAENEW: 또 찬양을 맡은 사람도 있었다. 이들은 레위 지파의 족장들로서, 성전의 부속건물에 살면서, 밤낮으로 자기들의 일만 해야 하였으므로, 다른 일은 하지 않았다.
v.WLB: 찬송하는 사람은 레위 집안의 우두머리들로서 성전 안에 있는 방에 머물러 있었는데 다른 일은 하지 않고 밤낮으로 자기 일을 했습니다.

v.CNV: 以上这些人都是利未各家族的首领，按他们的家谱都是首领；这些人都住在耶路撒冷。
v.ESV: These were heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, according to their generations, leaders. These lived in Jerusalem.
v.GAE: 그들은 다 레위 가문의 우두머리이며 그들의 족보의 우두머리로서 예루살렘에 거주하였더라
v.KJV: These chief fathers of the Levites were chief throughout their generations; these dwelt at Jerusalem.
v.KRV: 이상은 대대로 레위의 족장이요 으뜸이라 예루살렘에 거하였더라
v.NASB: These were heads of fathers' households of the Levites according to their generations, chief men, who lived in Jerusalem.
v.NIV: All these were heads of Levite families, chiefs as listed in their genealogy, and they lived in Jerusalem.
v.NRSV: These were heads of ancestral houses of the Levites, according to their generations; these leaders lived in Jerusalem.
v.SAENEW: 이들이 족보에 오른 레위 사람 족장들이다. 이 족장들은 예루살렘에서 살았다.
v.WLB: 이 모두가 레위 집안의 우두머리였고 그 족보에 우두머리로 올랐으며 예루살렘에서 살았습니다.

v.CNV: 住在基遍的有基遍的父亲耶利，他的妻子名叫玛迦。
v.ESV: In Gibeon lived the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, and the name of his wife was Maacah,
v.GAE: 기브온의 조상 여이엘은 기브온에 거주하였으니 그의 아내의 이름은 마아가라
v.KJV: And in Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jehiel, whose wife’s name was Maachah:
v.KRV: 기브온의 조상 여이엘은 기브온에 거하였으니 그 아내의 이름은 마아가라
v.NASB: In Gibeon Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived, and his wife's name was Maacah,
v.NIV: Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived in Gibeon. His wife’s name was Maakah,
v.NRSV: In Gibeon lived the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, and the name of his wife was Maacah.
v.SAENEW: 기브온의 조상 여이엘은 기브온에 살았으며, 그 아내의 이름은 마아가이다.
v.WLB: 기브온의 조상 여이엘은 기브온에 살았습니다. 그 아내의 이름은 마아가이고

v.CNV: 他的长子是亚伯顿，其余的是苏珥、基士、巴力、尼珥、拿答、
v.ESV: and his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab,
v.GAE: 그의 맏아들은 압돈이요 다음은 술과 기스와 바알과 넬과 나답과
v.KJV: And his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab,
v.KRV: 그 장자는 압돈이요 다음은 술과 기스와 바알과 넬과 나답과
v.NASB: and his firstborn son was Abdon, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab,
v.NIV: and his firstborn son was Abdon, followed by Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab,
v.NRSV: His firstborn son was Abdon, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab,
v.SAENEW: 그 맏아들은 압돈이고, 그 아래로 수르와 기스와 바알과 넬과 나답과
v.WLB: 그 맏아들은 압돈이며 그 다음으로는 술, 기스, 바알, 넬, 나답,

v.CNV: 基多、亚希约、撒迦利雅、米基罗。
v.ESV: Gedor, Ahio, Zechariah, and Mikloth;
v.GAE: 그돌과 아히오와 스가랴와 미글롯이며
v.KJV: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.
v.KRV: 그돌과 아히오와 스가랴와 미글롯이며
v.NASB: Gedor, Ahio, Zechariah and Mikloth.
v.NIV: Gedor, Ahio, Zechariah and Mikloth.
v.NRSV: Gedor, Ahio, Zechariah, and Mikloth;
v.SAENEW: 그돌과 아히요와 스가랴와 미글롯이 있다.
v.WLB: 그돌, 아히오, 스가랴, 미글롯입니다.

v.CNV: 米基罗生示米暗。他们也和他们的亲族一同住在耶路撒冷，和他们的亲族为邻。
v.ESV: and Mikloth was the father of Shimeam; and these also lived opposite their kinsmen in Jerusalem, with their kinsmen.
v.GAE: 미글롯은 시므암을 낳았으니 그들은 그들의 친족들과 더불어 마주하고 예루살렘에 거주하였더라
v.KJV: And Mikloth begat Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren at Jerusalem, over against their brethren.
v.KRV: 미글롯은 시므암을 낳았으니 이 무리도 그 형제로 더불어 서로 대하여 예루살렘에 거하였더라
v.NASB: Mikloth became the father of Shimeam. And they also lived with their relatives in Jerusalem opposite their other relatives.
v.NIV: Mikloth was the father of Shimeam. They too lived near their relatives in Jerusalem.
v.NRSV: and Mikloth became the father of Shimeam; and these also lived opposite their kindred in Jerusalem, with their kindred.
v.SAENEW: 미글롯은 시므암을 낳았다. 이들은 다른 친족들을 마주 보며 자기들의 친족들과 함께 예루살렘에서 살았다.
v.WLB: 미글롯은 시므암을 낳았습니다. 그들은 자기 친척들 가까이 예루살렘에서 살았습니다.

v.CNV: 尼珥生基士，基士生扫罗，扫罗生约拿单、麦基舒亚、亚比拿达和伊施．巴力。
v.ESV: Ner fathered Kish, Kish fathered Saul, Saul fathered Jonathan, Malchi-shua, Abinadab, and Eshbaal.
v.GAE: 넬은 기스를 낳고 기스는 사울을 낳고 사울은 요나단과 말기수아와 아비나답과 에스바알을 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Ner begat Kish; and Kish begat Saul; and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.
v.KRV: 넬은 기스를 낳았고 기스는 사울을 낳았고 사울은 요나단과 말기수아와 아비나답과 에스바알을 낳았으며
v.NASB: Ner became the father of Kish, and Kish became the father of Saul, and Saul became the father of Jonathan, Malchi-shua, Abinadab and Eshbaal.
v.NIV: Ner was the father of Kish, Kish the father of Saul, and Saul the father of Jonathan, Malki-Shua, Abinadab and Esh-Baal.
v.NRSV: Ner became the father of Kish, Kish of Saul, Saul of Jonathan, Malchishua, Abinadab, and Esh-baal;
v.SAENEW: 넬은 기스를 낳고, 기스는 사울을 낳고, 사울은 요나단과 말기수아와 아비나답과 에스바알을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 넬은 기스를 낳고 기스는 사울을 낳고 사울은 요나단, 말기수아, 아비나답, 에스바알을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 约拿单的儿子是米力．巴力；米力．巴力生米迦。
v.ESV: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal, and Merib-baal fathered Micah.
v.GAE: 요나단의 아들은 므립바알이라 므립바알은 미가를 낳았고
